description: Melinda May and Andrew share a quiet early morning, discussing family planning and their hopes for the future. Phil Coulson arrives to pick up May for a mission, and the trio exchange light banter before May and Coulson set out. The mood is warm and intimate, highlighting May's life outside of S.H.I.E.L.D.

transcript.line: Mmm, you're up early.
Hey, we got a family to make, and there's only one way to do that. And I'm dedicated to the cause.
Hmm, so thoughtful.
When you get back, maybe you and I can take a trip.
Hmm.
Somewhere warm. Focus our efforts to expand. He's gonna be a hell-raiser.
Uh, not in my house. My house has rules.
Oh, so you plan on being exactly like your own mother?
What... with a few modifications, yes. He's always early. Stall him.
Come on in! It's open!
Andrew?
Good morning. You really leave your front door unlocked?
Uh, got the best security system in the world. And you're early. This is my time.
Sorry.
So, who you going after? Am I about to get a new patient?
Don't know yet. But yeah, maybe.
Hey, no leaking operational secrets. Come on, Coulson. We're gonna be late.
I'm early.
Keep her safe out there.
She's supposed to keep me safe.
Yeah.
Hey. You be careful.
I will. And when I come back, we've got work to do. Come on. I got to go.
